description: Welcome home to Avalon Woods. This completely renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom townhome will impress the most discerning buyers. Thoughtful upgrades include an open-concept gourmet kitchen, stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, designer lighting, and wide-plank hardwood flooring throughout. This rare end unit also features a large room in basement that can be used as a rec room, office, guest room or as needed per your requirements. Double-wide garage and a generous private yard with a deck perfect for BBQ and outdoor entertaining. Enjoy an unbeatable location, within steps to the Fleetwood Community Center & Library, shopping, transit and future skytrain. Nearby amenities include Fleetwood Leisure Center, highly rated elementary and secondary schools (K–12).
